A vectorized memory layer gives agents shared context

If agents keep relearning the same business rules, the company is paying the context tax over and over.

Where it removes work

  • Recurring tasks start with stronger context
  • Past decisions are easier to retrieve
  • Less dependence on chat history archaeology

What Sysmatic would build

  • Capture durable facts from real work
  • Embed and index memory entries
  • Expose retrieval through an MCP tool with citations
